prompt: Haha, this movie is so funny, I can't stop laughing!
Great, this meal is really delicious, haha, mom's cooking is excellent!
The project is finally a success, haha, everyone worked hard!
Oh, you're late on time again, truly a punctuality role model.
You can even mess up such a simple question, truly impressive!
This idea is absolutely brilliant, completely without considering feasibility.
This is simply outrageous, how could this plan be approved?
How many times have I told you? Why won't you listen!
Traffic jam again, it's driving me crazy, I'll be late for work again!
Haha, long time no see, come in and sit, I've missed you so much!
Awesome, you play so well, haha, let's keep going!
Haha, you're finally here, come on in, I've prepared lots of delicious food!
My kitten is gone, boohoo, I miss it so much.
I failed the exam again, boohoo, how could this happen.
My favorite cup broke, boohoo, I'm so sad.
Oh, you're here. Well, just sit wherever.
It's no use telling me these things, go find someone in charge.
Young people always have many ideas, but they're not necessarily useful.
Ah! What was that sound, it's so scary!
Ah! There's an insect, run! I'm most afraid of insects!
Ah! Oh my god, almost crashed, that was close!
You can't even do this small thing right, what else can I expect from you?
With your meager experience, how dare you boss people around here?
Oh, how remarkable, telling your glorious past stories again?
Cough cough, what is this smell, it's so awful!
Cough cough, this place is too dirty, it's unbearable.
Cough cough, why does this dish taste like this, it's inedible.
Hey, don't bother me, can't you see I'm busy?
Move aside, I'm in a hurry, can you get out of the way?
Hurry up and bring me my stuff, what are you dawdling for!
Sigh, work pressure has been so high lately, I feel a bit suffocated.
Sigh, why is life so difficult, I feel so tired.
Sigh, I messed up the exam again this time, there's no hope.
Mhm, got it, everything you say is right, just leave it at that.
Alright, alright, I'll listen to you, I have no objections.
Oh, really. That's good then, mhm.
Ah! I can't believe my eyes, it's so unexpected!
Ah! Is this for me? Oh my god, what a surprise!
Ah! What? The project finished early? That's incredible!
Haha, your move just now was so funny, pure comedic effect!
Haha, look at your sleepy eyes, stayed up playing games again last night, didn't you?
Haha, what, trying to sneak snacks again? Gotcha!
The morning air is really good, take it slow, no rush.
It's fine, let's calm down about this problem, we'll always find a solution.
Mhm, brew a cup of tea, listen to music, enjoy this moment of tranquility.
Wow! Look, Mom, isn't my sandcastle super tall!
Come on, let's play, this new toy is so fun, shall we play together!
Teacher, I finished my homework first today, I'm so great!
Ugh, why is this computer frozen again, it's driving me crazy!
Seriously, it didn't pass again, I put in so much effort, sigh!
Sigh, did you even listen to me, can't you be a little more serious!
Cough cough, your efficiency is truly 'high', it's almost quitting time and you're not done yet.
Ha, your excuse, cough cough, is really poorly made up, isn't it?
Cough cough, you truly are a busy person, how many appointments does it take to see you once?
Awesome, Mom said she's taking me to the park today, haha!
Yay! I finally finished building this Lego, I'm so happy!
I love this birthday gift so much, thank you, Mom and Dad!
Yawn… Are you done talking? I don't have time for your nonsense.
Oh, really. Yawn… it has nothing to do with me anyway.
Yawn… Just say what you want to say, I'm listening, that's it.
I tried so hard for so long, but I still didn't get into my dream university, I'm so sad.
How could he do this to me? Is our friendship just going to end like this?
My idol group announced their disbandment, I feel like my youth is over, boohoo.
Sigh, with your meager tricks, what new stunts can you pull off?
Please, to show off with this level of skill, it's truly laughable, sigh.
Sigh, don't think you're so great, in my eyes, you're nothing.
Mom, it's thundering outside, I'm so scared, can you hug me?
Ah! There's a strange shadow outside the window, is it a monster!
I don't dare to sleep alone, it's too dark, I'm afraid of bad guys.
Cough cough, what's wrong with you, didn't you see I'm busy?
Cough cough, can you hurry up, stop dawdling here, okay?
Cough cough, don't block my way, move aside for me immediately!
This food has gone bad, it smells weird, it's simply inedible, so disgusting.
That guy was making a racket in public, it's truly disgusting.
Why is it this kind of handling again, it really makes me feel sick.
Yawn… Mmm, got it, I understood everything you said, no problem.
Yawn… Oh, I see, that's good, just do as you say.
Yawn… Alright, alright, whatever you say, anything else? If not, I'm leaving.
My children are all busy, I'm the only one left at home, sigh, it's so desolate.
My health is getting worse, things I used to be able to do, I can't do anymore.
My spouse passed away years ago, my heart always feels so empty.
Oh, isn't this our busy bee, how do you have time to be here?
Ha, secretly looking at some handsome guy or beautiful girl again? Be careful, I might tell on you.
Stop pretending, do you think I don't know your little schemes? Spill it!
Wow! Is this for me? I can't believe it, it's so beautiful!
Oh my goodness! How did the rabbit come out of the hat, is this magic?
Ah! The kitten can talk, I heard it, it really can talk!
Sigh, everything is finally resolved, now I can get some good rest.
It's drizzling outside, I'm quietly looking out the window, sigh, it feels so good.
Sigh, I've come to terms with it, some things can't be forced, just let nature take its course.
